title: Mellow Japanese Cheddar Shio Ramen
description: A floral and energizing Japanese ramen dish featuring cheddar cheese, cooked in a clay pot and served in a ceramic tagine, perfect for a light and refreshing meal. This raw-friendly ramen is made with flaky and flavorful ingredients.
instructions: Heat the sesame oil in the ceramic tagine over medium heat.
Add the sliced mushrooms and cook until they are tender and lightly browned.
Add the grated ginger and minced garlic and cook for 1 minute.
Add the soy sauce, rice vinegar, salt, and black pepper, and stir to combine.
Add the shredded cheddar cheese and stir until it is melted and well combined.
Add the Japanese noodles and cook until they are heated through.
Stir in the thinly sliced green onions.
Serve the ramen hot, garnished with additional green onions if desired.
Cook the ramen in the clay pot for 10 minutes to allow the flavors to meld together.
Serve the ramen in the ceramic tagine and enjoy.
